search_queries_used: site:asahq.org anesthesia documentation advance directives patient goals consent
site:doh.gov.ae day surgery patient preferences care plan consent
site:rcoa.ac.uk perioperative shared decision high risk goals of care
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for Perioperative goals-of-care documentation
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for Perioperative goals-of-care documentation
rejection_reasons: Goals, capacity, values, and treatment limits require a real patient or proxy discussion and local legal process.
The candidate source category "automatic code-status forms" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients receiving anesthesia or perioperative care when advance directives, values, preferences, or treatment goals are relevant and discussed.
setting_applicability: Partial for preanesthesia documentation; dedicated serious-illness, palliative, capacity, and resuscitation decisions require separate sources.
UAE_applicability: International ASA evidence supported by DoH patient-centred care requirements; UAE law and facility policy remain essential.
recency_verification: Current ASA 2023, DoH V1/2024, and RCoA GPAS 2025 sections were reviewed on 2026-07-13.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA section supports documenting advance directives, patient disposition, anesthesia plan, consent, and patient-centred discussion when completed; it does not infer goals of care. The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Perioperative goals-of-care documentation; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Capacity, surrogate, advance directive validity, resuscitation status, treatment limits, palliative goals, emergency exception, and legal documentation remain unsupported.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
